# ZETUP PRO Corporate Services

> ZETUP PRO is a Dubai-based corporate services company providing transparent PRO services, mainland company formation, visa processing, Emiratisation compliance, and business support for companies with 10–250 employees. Founded by Dennis Kristensen (Denmark) and Edina Sultan (17+ years UAE government expertise). Scandinavian values: published pricing, no hidden fees, 30-day termination clause. Office in Business Bay, Dubai.

## Services

- [PRO Services Dubai](https://zetup.ae/en/services/pro-services): Government liaison, visa processing, document clearing, trade license management for Dubai mainland companies. Monthly retainers from AED 8,000/month for 25–40 employees; AED 14,000/month for 40–80 employees; AED 22,000/month for 80–250+ employees.
- [Company Formation Dubai](https://zetup.ae/en/services/company-formation): Mainland LLC formation with 100% foreign ownership. From AED 7,500. Full transparency on government fees vs service fees.
- [Visa Processing](https://zetup.ae/en/services/visa-services): Employment, investor, dependent, Golden, and Green visa processing. From AED 3,500. Standard processing 3–7 business days.
- [Emiratisation Services](https://zetup.ae/en/services/emiratisation): 2026 compliance management, Nafis registration, quota tracking, MoHRE reporting. From AED 3,000/month. December 2026 deadline: 10% Emirati workforce for 50+ employee companies. Non-compliance fine: AED 9,000/month per missing position.
- [Trade License Renewal](https://zetup.ae/en/services/trade-license-renewal): Annual DET renewals, activity amendments, partner changes. Included in retainer.
- [Corporate Tax Services](https://zetup.ae/en/services/corporate-tax): FTA coordination, EmaraTax filing, corporate tax compliance. From AED 2,000/quarter.
- [Document Clearing](https://zetup.ae/en/services/document-clearing): MOFA attestation, embassy legalisation, document translation. From AED 150/document.
- [Golden Visa](https://zetup.ae/en/services/golden-visa): End-to-end 10-year residency applications for investors and professionals. From AED 5,000. Processing time: 2–4 weeks.

## Guides

- [PRO Services Complete Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/pro-services-dubai-complete-guide): What PRO services are, costs, how to choose a provider.
- [Mainland Company Formation Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/dubai-mainland-company-formation): 10-step process, costs, documents, timeline.
- [Free Zone vs Mainland Comparison](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/free-zone-vs-mainland): Side-by-side analysis of trading rights, ownership, costs, visas.
- [UAE Visa Processing Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/uae-visa-processing): All visa types, processing times, requirements.
- [Emiratisation Compliance Guide 2026](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/emiratisation-compliance-2026): Quotas, fines, Nafis subsidies, compliance steps.
- [UAE Corporate Tax Guide](https://zetup.ae/en/guides/uae-corporate-tax): 9% rate, Small Business Relief expiring Dec 2026, filing deadlines.

## Pricing

Published transparent pricing with three tiers:
- Essentials: AED 8,000/month (25–40 employees, 15 visa transactions/month)
- Professional: AED 14,000/month (40–80 employees, 30 visa transactions/month, Emiratisation tracking)
- Enterprise: AED 22,000/month (80–250+ employees, unlimited transactions, full Emiratisation programme)
Government fees always itemised separately from service fees. No lock-in contracts — 30-day termination clause.

## Differentiators

- Only PRO company in Dubai that publishes full retainer pricing online
- Scandinavian transparency: service fees separated from government fees on every invoice
- Dedicated WhatsApp group per client with real-time status updates
- 60-day advance renewal reminders
- Specialise in mid-market mainland companies (10–250 employees)
- Founded by a Danish entrepreneur and a 17-year UAE government specialist
